docs.title: Project Structure
docs.text:
• Web Portal (ccms/): A Next.js application for the console.
  • Hardware (ESP32_wifi_CCMS_v1.0/, v2.0/): C++ firmware based on PlatformIO to interact with mqtt and AWS.
  • Backend (Lambda/): Serverless Python AWS Lambda functions.

docs.title: Hardware (ESP32)
docs.text: Firmware versions for the ESP32 microcontrollers communicating over WiFi/MQTT.

docs.title: Lambda Backend
docs.text: Python AWS Lambda functions for handling API endpoints and SQS data saving.

docs.title: Web Portal
docs.text: The web portal is built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
